# Day 2: The Experiment on Red Beads {.unnumbered}

### Run charts

Before commencing our study of the Experiment on Red Beads, there is just one “technical” matter to
introduce—even for those on Stats-level 0 (or 00)! It is the type of chart known by various names such as a
*time series graph* or a *running record* or simply a *run chart*. We’ll call it a *run chart*.
